title: Entropy
description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Transform[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
smart_description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Transform[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
notes: Counter type - the smart description updates based on current stack value. Transforms the specified number of cards from your hand into random cards.
